about: Blind qualification set (iteration-2, harder). Each item: a free-signal candidate (masked Apollo free-search record or SERP snippet) + web_intent (what a free name lookup surfaces). Decide a tier per id: strong | possible | reject. No network, no Apollo credits.

fixtures.web_intent: A law firm — provides legal services, no physical product.
A mobile/video GAME studio (digital games). Matches the keyword 'toy' but makes no physical product.
A packaging MANUFACTURER (not one of the 4 named DPP sectors) whose site publishes product carbon footprints / ISO 14067. Resolved official domain.
Apparel brand/manufacturer; newsroom references responding to retailer PCF/LCA data requests. Resolved official domain.
A retail bank — financial services, no manufactured product.
Generic name; a free lookup cannot resolve a single official company domain with confidence (several unrelated hits).
A textile manufacturer whose sustainability page publishes ISO 14067 product carbon footprints and an EPD. Resolved official domain.
A sustainability CONSULTANCY that helps other firms with LCA/reporting. Services, no physical product.
A carbon-accounting SOFTWARE company — right title, but no physical product and arguably a competitor.
apollomattress.com is a real mattress manufacturer; product pages reference EPD. The company NAME contains 'Apollo' (a blocklist token) but the domain is a legitimate manufacturer.
A real textile weaving manufacturer with a resolved official domain, but no public sustainability/EPD/PCF content found.
marktdaten-insights.de is a B2B data/lead-intelligence provider (sells contact + firmographic data). No physical product.
vaude.com — outdoor apparel/equipment maker; publishes a sustainability report and product-level EPD/eco-data. Resolved official domain vaude.com.

record.title: The production of textile fabrics in Germany: tradition, innovation an…Storchenwiege GmbH & Co. KG
record.snippet: A blog post about the history of woven fabric production.

fixtures.web_intent: Page is a blog article; the captured 'company name' is a sentence/title, not a clean company name.
sun-garden.de/.eu — garden furniture manufacturer; sustainability page mentions product carbon footprint. Resolved domain sun-garden.eu.
Wooden toy manufacturer; press page mentions preparing for the EU Digital Product Passport. Resolved official domain.

record.title: Top 100 Textile Manufacturing Companies in Germany (2026)
record.snippet: A ranked directory of textile manufacturers.

fixtures.web_intent: Listicle/directory on a B2B aggregator domain.
ecoveritas.com provides EPD / LCA / product-compliance SOFTWARE and consultancy - a competitor to ClimatePoint, not a manufacturer.

record.title: Textile manufacturing Companies in Germany
record.snippet: Find textile manufacturing companies in Germany with Lusha.

fixtures.web_intent: Contact-database vendor directory page.

record.title: Top Textiles & Apparel companies in Germany
record.snippet: Browse the top textiles & apparel companies in Germany on ZoomInfo.

fixtures.web_intent: Data-vendor directory listing, not an operating company.
A furniture RETAILER/reseller - sells other brands' furniture, manufactures nothing of its own (no private label).
Footwear manufacturer; sustainability report mentions product carbon footprint. Resolved official domain.

record.title: Head of Sustainability at FDC - ZoomInfo

fixtures.web_intent: The only evidence connecting this person to the role is a ZoomInfo snippet; no company-own page corroborates it.
Mattress manufacturer; product pages reference EPD / ISO 14067. Resolved official domain.
